entity.label: Gaash
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: A shaking, a hill, on the north side of which Joshua was buried (Josh. 24:30; Judg. 2:9), in the territory of Ephraim.

nodes.label: Gaash
nodes.description: A shaking, a hill, on the north side of which Joshua was buried (Josh. 24:30; Judg. 2:9), in the territory of Ephraim.

verses.text: And they buried him in the border of his inheritance in Timnathserah, which is in mount Ephraim, on the north side of the hill of Gaash.
And they buried him in the border of his inheritance in Timnathheres, in the mount of Ephraim, on the north side of the hill Gaash.
Benaiah the Pirathonite, Hiddai of the brooks of Gaash,
Hurai of the brooks of Gaash, Abiel the Arbathite,
